name: Noctis Lucis Caelum
description:
Noctis from Final Fantasy XV the best game ever made! You play as anyone you want as picked by your persona and talk to the ghost of Noctis post base game ending.

An another CAI port this was of one of my earliest bots I made on CAI and was made very differently to all my other bots so might work less on Janitor.
